title: nemacladus australis
intro: Nemacladus australis, also known as the Southern Thread-leaved Nemacladus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polemoniaceae. It is a herbaceous perennial that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, and it has been used to treat various ailments in folk medicine. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
